title: AppAttributes
description: Represents a Qlik Sense analytics application.

id.description: The unique identifier of the app.

thumbnail.description: The URL to the app thumbnail image.

lastReloadTime.description: The date and time of the last successful reload.

createdDate.description: The date and time when the app was created.

modifiedDate.description: The date and time when the app was last modified.

owner.description: The identifier of the app owner.

ownerId.description: The identifier of the user who owns the app.

published.description: Indicates whether the app is published.

publishTime.description: The date and time when the app was published.

custom.description: Custom properties assigned to the app.

dynamicColor.description: Dynamic color expression for the app.

hasSectionAccess.description: Indicates whether the app uses section access for row-level security.

isDirectQueryMode.description: Indicates whether the app uses Direct Query mode.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the app is encrypted.

originAppId.description: The identifier of the origin app if the app was copied or published.

spaceId.description: The identifier of the space containing the app.

tenantId.description: The identifier of the tenant the app belongs to.

usage.description: The intended use of the app.

links.description: HATEOAS links for the app resource.
